description: As the Global IT Operations Manager, you are configuring Snipe-IT for a new international branch office in Berlin, Germany. Create a new Location named 'Berlin Branch' (City: 'Berlin') with a Currency override of 'EUR' and a new Supplier named 'Berlin Tech Wholesale' (City: 'Berlin'). Update the profile of employee 'Klaus Weber' (username: kweber) by changing his Title to 'Country Manager' and his Location to 'Berlin Branch'. Relocate his laptop (asset tag 'ASSET-MAC-088') by updating its Default Location to 'Berlin Branch' and checking it out to him. Register a locally purchased printer by creating an Asset Model named 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw' (Category: Printers, Manufacturer: HP) and an Asset with Asset Tag 'ASSET-BER-PRN-01', Model 'HP Color LaserJet Pro M479fdw', Status 'Ready to Deploy', Default Location 'Berlin Branch', Supplier 'Berlin Tech Wholesale', and Purchase Cost '450'.
